roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:AGT RAMY YASSINE SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STATE PAROLE/PDP/WIAPTR/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:THE PAROLEE'S ADMISSION IS AS TO VIOLATION #1 ONLY,/3000REIN/PAJ:50 DAYS/X:WITH TIME LOSS/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 8 DAYS,/4019HALF/X:DISTRICT ATTORNEY MOTION TO DISMISS REMAINING ALLEGATIONS IS GRANTED,/X:PAROLE REINSTATED TO: 2-15-19 /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLEUPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/
